query.sql:
SELECT COALESCE(status, '未知') as status_name,
COUNT(*) as order_count,
COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as total_amount
FROM nb_erp_purchase_orders WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY CASE status
  WHEN '草稿' THEN 1 WHEN '待审批' THEN 2 WHEN '已审批' THEN 3
  WHEN '部分到货' THEN 4 WHEN '已到货' THEN 5 WHEN '已关闭' THEN 6
  WHEN '已取消' THEN 7 ELSE 8 END
